content:
晚安，我發現這張卡有兩個bug，不過是想起來要回報，沒有錄到影像。如果這樣不行的話我再回去復現看看（其中一個很難復現orz

第一個是在第六章使用時，卡面說明隨機三個未攜帶鑰令，但在鑰令極少的情況下，是會隨到本次攜帶鑰令的
因為現在鑰令多了很難重現這個問題，所以也想過一般情況下算是有利玩家的bug不改好像也沒關係 但又覺得遊戲說明符合遊戲實作很重要不然玩起來像在揣測天意 所以還是報一下

第二個是在第八章使用時，純白之帆啟動的鑰令會被計算為出隊攜帶的鑰令，所以出完之後按左下角鑰令會直接進二次鑰令，無法啟動原本攜帶的鑰令

歡愉之理的bug如影片
這支影片裡錄了兩遍
其中一遍不知為何在使用完之後沒有抽回等量的隨機卡，手牌變超少，繁育之理印出來的雷霆就拉不出來了
這個流程我打了十次有，只有這次發現這個狀況
也在同一次關卡裡換出牌順序正常觸發了正常棄牌抽牌

thread_title: 💭「处理中」忘卻篇第六章共鳴卡純白之帆 & 第八章共鳴歡愉之理

content:
首先探索開始盡量找詩人的0費卡躍遷掛喜光環（SR命輪可將一張詩人的卡置入手中），如果想打順一點的話可以刷一下。
後續躍遷優先度：温2費=鳥人任何卡>醫生任何卡(不考慮詩人卡）
主要打法：温大招給狂鳥人、詩人大招给狂全隊、醫生拐銀鑰(「小小心願」给狂鳥人）&兼職道中副C。
大部分時間等超限(除非急防）
Boss戰打輸出時確保牌庫和手中至少有12或18張黑羽（若等於2-3個超限）、打Boss時儲黑羽的前置功夫可以只開普大（打輸出回合時請開超限）
覺醒順序：鳥人>温>醫生>詩人
鳥人覺醒十分必要
優先度極高
超維空間：非致命時（没有死抗時才用）不要在道中開，空間滿了去湮滅（可順便給狂醫生和拿銀鑰），等Boss戰有超維空間額外回合可能可以開3個超限有輸出
提示：探索第一關被打出死抗是正常的，不需怕。另外由於鳥人和醫生專武，在超維空間鳥人可獲100或以上狂，若狂不夠開超限可以照開普大，另外還會令在空間第一次開的鑰令生效兩次。最後一個小知識是每回合打出的第一張黑羽可给鳥人10狂。
賣卡：不賣卡黑印不夠
可賣温3費、醫生防禦、詩人2費（個人不會）（比較窮的圖可能要賣兩張非打擊防禦指令卡）
thread_title: 💭「处理中」忘卻篇第六章共鳴卡純白之帆 & 第八章共鳴歡愉之理

content:
Hi BIAV,

Some of the older players and I were talking about the new design choices and are a little sad with the direction.

We like it when a unit comes out and it has mechanics that can add/interact with other units/realm mechanics. Corposant was a great new unit. She added to the aftershock group of units. Similarly, recently adding aftershock to Cassiah's kit is great!

However, a lot of the other recent new units feel like they are in a vacuum with their kits. They add this new layer specific only to them. Most are not interacting with previous mechanics like, sacrifice, counter, poison.....and the game feels like it's missing mechanic interactions to discover.

This brings me to Pollux. His kit feels like he plays really well with Castor, but it doesn't seem (maybe I haven't discovered it yet) a way to make his finishing card move  "Cleaning Judgement" stronger by using a completely different unit.

Example: Corposant added to Aurita being able to do more damage. These interactions are what I love to find and build around.

Pollux just seems like, tank and wait style (very blue). Play heart, play castor plume -> then eventually play Cleaning Judgement. But I haven't found a way to increase Cleansing Judgement DMG with already in game mechanics with another unit (*maybe its too early*). This loss of interactions to buff your unit's finisher move is just sad to me.

A suggestion is to have his Cleansing Judgement add a mechanic -> increase dmg by X for every other card (not just his own) played before this card this turn. -> Now there is a mechanic I am looking for ways to optimize. This is fun to me. Rather than the basic play card, build up layers, do damage.
thread_title: Pollux and Game Feedback

content:
I do agree with this. As someone who was hoping for Pollux to be usable with Castor, yes, he is that, but the way his cards and kit play out makes him feel like he won't live very long, and that hurts. 

His "Sin Marks" are fascinating, but they seem like a different connection that just sits there and does passive bleed damage. It's fascinating, but if there had been a way for it to interact better with Corrosion or other preexisting mechanics like Kaly said above, it would make him more enjoyable to play.

thread_title: ✅「已解决」鸟弟2费没有把圣心抽出来

content: 队伍里除了墨菲零费，最低的就是1费打防和鸟弟圣心，按我的理解洗到抽牌顶同费情况下应该是鸟弟圣心先抽出来。刷好感摸的几把里当鸟弟圣心第一次打出后再用鸟弟2费抓牌确实是会把圣心抓出来，但是第二次打出后就不一定了（当然也可能是我样本太少实际上第一次也不一定）觉得比较奇怪先来反馈一下
thread_title: ✅「已解决」鸟弟2费没有把圣心抽出来

content: 代码是这么写的
thread_title: ✅「已解决」鸟弟2费没有把圣心抽出来

content: 又做了一些多的尝试，发现鸟弟圣心的优先级没有问题，如果是用鸟哥钥令来抓取的话圣心有同费优先级，那有可能是因为鸟弟2费抓指令卡而圣心为衍生卡的机制问题。但是同为衍生卡，鸟哥黑羽能被鸟弟2费抓取但是船长领航不能抓鸟弟圣心没有同费优先级，所以鸟弟2费这个抓卡到底是个什么情况<:processing:1357185814567718963>

thread_title: ✅「Answered」Pale Descendent WoD bug

content:
Apologies for the translation error earlier. 
The correct translation is as follows:The effect of Pale Descendant is to impose24% Poison based on the equipper's Defense on the enemy with the highest HP, rather than triggering a 24% Poison effect.
We will arrange for the fix and release the correct translation version as soon as possible🙏
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Pale Descendent WoD bug

content: ✅「Answered」Pale Descendent WoD bug

content:
So just a bit of a debate regarding lore, but who is this "she" that Murphy is referring to here? 

it would make sense that it would the the entity that gave Murphy power, and wouldn't make sense in reverse as I don't remember Murphy giving power to anyone...except the infant? 

is this a case of translation, a minor grammer mistake or intended? either way thank you very much for helping us out out to settle the question.
